description: The puma R698 NM men's shoes will give you even more street cred while still being comfortable. These shoes are ideal for training on rough terrain and trail running.UpperBreathable mesh upper with leather detailingPerforations on the upper for ventilationSynthetic lining for extra comfortDurable rubber outsoleLace-ups for snug FitPadded ankle supportLightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfortJumping cat logo embroidered on the tongue and at the back of the collarMidsoleEco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioningEVA midsole for better shock absorptionOutsoleRubber traction outsole with tyre tread pattern and heel bumper for better protection to the heel and better gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
